purpose: S4 bridge dry-run admission manifest only; this does not authorize semantic execution of model-authored suites.

scope.allowed_action: trusted sentinel dry-run for bridge isolation prerequisites
scope.forbidden_action: importing or executing generated suite.py artifacts

review_notes: The preflight runner must use an available no-egress isolation primitive before any bridge can be considered ready.
The preflight runner must scrub secret-bearing environment variables and redirect HOME/TMPDIR into the dry-run workspace.
The generated suites and target inventory must remain identical across reference-oracle and mutant runs.
This manifest is intentionally limited to the bridge dry-run gate; semantic S4 execution remains disabled until a reviewed executor consumes this gate.
